name: CEVA INC
business: CEVA INC is a licensor of silicon and software intellectual property (IP) enabling Physical AI, which unifies connectivity, sensing, and inference in devices. Its comprehensive portfolio powers smart edge products across consumer IoT, automotive, industrial, infrastructure, mobile, and PC markets. Over 20 billion devices have shipped with Ceva IP since 2003, with approximately 2 billion devices annually incorporating its technologies.

exposures.sentence: We are the leader in silicon and software intellectual property (IP) enabling Physical AI - the intelligence embedded directly into billions of devices that connect, sense, and infer data in the real world.
Our inference portfolio addresses the full AI performance spectrum - from ultra efficient embedded AI workloads to high performance generative AI and automotive grade inferencing.

These customers integrate our technologies into their application specific integrated circuits (ASICs), application specific standard products (ASSPs), and systems on chip (SoCs), which they manufacture, market, and sell globally.
We provide a comprehensive suite of DSPs and embedded software solutions that transform raw sensor data into actionable intelligence.

Our technologies support key perception workloads - including vision, radar, IMU fusion, audio enhancement, spatial computing, and environmental sensing - used across wearables, smartphones, XR devices, robotics, industrial systems, and automotive ADAS.

Our technologies support key perception workloads - including vision, radar, IMU fusion, audio enhancement, spatial computing, and environmental sensing - used across wearables, smartphones, XR devices, robotics, industrial systems, and automotive ADAS.

Our connectivity technologies are foundational to the smart edge ecosystem, powering mass market consumer audio devices, wearables, smartphones, IoT sensors, home networking equipment, industrial automation systems, and next generation infrastructure.

Our PentaG RAN platform, including the Ceva XC22 multi thread DSP, extends our leadership into 5G RAN and 5G Advanced for data centers and infrastructure, enabling scalable, customizable solutions for next generation networks.

catalysts.event: Commercial licensing of Ceva-Waves Links Bluetooth and Wi-Fi radio product line
catalysts.sentence: We expect to begin commercial licensing of this product line in 2026, although its commercial success cannot be assured.

tamClaims.claim: Physical AI and Edge AI total addressable market of $170 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: Based on market research, we believe these sectors will represent a $170 billion total addressable market for Physical AI and Edge AI by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: More than 16.5 billion devices annually by 2029 for Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, UWB, and cellular IoT
tamClaims.sentence: ABI Research projects more than 16.5 billion devices annually by 2029.

tamClaims.claim: $58 billion in computer vision AI hardware and $110 billion in conversational AI hardware revenues by 2032
tamClaims.sentence: Bloomberg Intelligence forecasts $58 billion in computer vision AI hardware and $110 billion in conversational AI hardware revenues by 2032, underscoring the scale of this opportunity.
